response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional full-stack experience across top-tier companies like Google and Meta, with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and deep expertise in AI-agent infrastructure, testing, and cloud tooling. His open-source contributions and architectural versatility are impressive, though his resume contains inconsistencies (e.g., current employment at Google starting in 2025, founder role at Amazon) and lacks explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin/Java, which are key to the role.
strengths: Proven full-stack experience at Google and Meta with AI-agent and automation tooling
Strong open-source contributions and testing framework expertise (Vitest-like tools, TDD)
Extensive cloud, containerization, and API integration experience (AWS, Docker, Kubernetes)
concerns: Resume contains implausible dates (e.g., Google role starting in 2025; Amazon founder role ongoing)
No explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin/Java — core secondary stack requirements
German language skill is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in Berlin-based enterprise team

key_factors.factor: Missing key stack keywords (Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin)
